issues.description: DSL is missing the Blocker ability entirely. The card has two separate abilities: (1) Blocker passive effect triggered on opponent's attack declaration, and (2) Activate: Main ability. Only the second ability is represented.
Cost reduction should be represented as -1 (or similar cost unit), not -1000 (power). The effect reduces cost by 1, not power by 1000.
Target should respect 'up to 1' constraint. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' may allow multiple targets. Should include maxTargets: 1.
